description: Began my professional career, stepping into software development and early QA practices. Learning the ropes of enterprise delivery and core banking workflows.
Delivered automation across web, mobile, desktop, and API channels. Mastered Selenium, Appium, and REST Assured for retail and commercial banking workflows.
Led automation engineering for lending and deposits. Implemented Docker Test Containers and microservice-oriented testing to streamline quality processes.
Built a privacy-focused Flutter notes application. Over the years introduced Biometric unlock, Voice notes, Habit Tracker, and extended Markdown support.
Taking full ownership of automation quality across banking platforms. Driving large-scale Cypress E2E automation for Customer Onboarding, CDD, CRA, and Risk Assessment.
Architected a multi-platform genealogy ecosystem. Engineered containerized backend services using Docker Compose and established automated, environment-aware CI/CD pipelines.
Started an experimental platform exploring AI-assisted frontend development and modern React Native patterns.
Engineered a production-ready, privacy-first Flutter application utilizing Drift/SQLite for local-first data processing and financial insight extraction.
